items.d: A very big rock in space that travels near the sun, between two planets.
items.s: Many ___ move between Mars and Jupiter and never come close to a planet.
items.hintDe: Ein riesiger Felsbrocken, der im Weltall um die Sonne fliegt.

items.d: Somebody whose job is to fly into space.
items.s: She has always wanted to be an ___ and fly into space.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der mit einem Raumfahrzeug ins All fliegt.

items.d: A big noise when a thing blows up and breaks into pieces.
items.s: The big ___ destroyed the whole spaceship at the start of its flight.
items.hintDe: Ein lauter Knall, wenn etwas in die Luft fliegt.

items.d: The path that an object travels again and again near a planet or star in space.
items.s: The space shuttle stayed in ___ for many days, travelling close to the Earth.
items.hintDe: Der Weg, auf dem ein Raumschiff immer wieder um einen Planeten fliegt.

items.d: A small plate of metal with writing on it that we put up to think of somebody.
items.s: The astronauts put a ___ on the moon with a message for all mankind.
items.hintDe: Ein kleines Metallschild mit einer Aufschrift, das an etwas erinnert.

items.d: A flying machine that can carry astronauts away from the Earth and back, then fly again.
items.s: A ___ can fly into space again and again, like a plane.
items.hintDe: Ein Raumfahrzeug, das immer wieder ins All und zurück fliegen kann.

items.d: When you add up everybody and everything; in all.
items.s: ___ there are eight planets that move close to our sun.
items.hintDe: Wenn du alles zusammenzählst.

items.d: The thick cover of gases all over a planet that protects it from the sun.
items.s: Mars has a very thin ___, so humans could not breathe there.
items.hintDe: Die Hülle aus Gasen, die einen Planeten umgibt.

items.d: All the people who work on a ship or a spaceship.
items.s: All seven members of the ___ died when the spaceship exploded.
items.hintDe: Alle Leute, die zusammen auf einem Schiff oder Raumschiff arbeiten.

items.d: So horrible that you do not want to taste, smell or touch it.
items.s: In space your favourite food can taste ___ and horrible.
items.hintDe: So eklig, dass du es nicht essen oder anfassen möchtest.

items.d: The job of designing and building machines, bridges and roads.
items.s: She wants to study ___ because she loves building machines and bridges.
items.hintDe: Das Fach, in dem man Maschinen und Brücken plant und baut.

items.d: All the people on Earth; the whole human race.
items.s: Landing on the moon was a great day for all ___.
items.hintDe: Alle Menschen auf der Erde zusammen.

items.d: Going away from the Earth to visit the planets, stars and moons.
items.s: Thanks to ___, people have walked on the moon and lived in space.
items.hintDe: Das Reisen weg von der Erde, hinaus ins Weltall.

items.d: The time in the morning when the sun appears in the sky.
items.s: We were up very early to watch the ___ at the start of the day.
items.hintDe: Der Moment am Morgen, wenn die Sonne aufgeht.

items.d: The time in the evening when the sun is no longer in the sky.
items.s: At the end of the day we watched a beautiful ___ over the sea.
items.hintDe: Der Moment am Abend, wenn die Sonne untergeht.

items.d: A sign that shows you a thing is dangerous, so you can be careful.
items.s: There was a ___ that the sea was too dangerous for swimming.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das dich auf eine Gefahr aufmerksam macht.

items.d: A short notice or short message that helps to sell a thing.
items.s: There was an ___ for flights to London in the newspaper.
items.hintDe: Eine kurze Anzeige, die etwas verkaufen soll.

items.d: A flying machine that you can use to travel in space.
items.s: One day there will be many kinds of ___ that can take people into space.
items.hintDe: Ein Fahrzeug, mit dem man ins All reisen kann.

items.d: To do with selling and making money.
items.s: The company uses its spaceship for ___ flights and earns a lot of money.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das mit Verkaufen und Geldverdienen zu tun hat.

items.d: To ask for a thing in a strong way because you feel it is your right.
items.s: Tell me the truth now. I ___ to know what happened.
items.hintDe: Etwas sehr bestimmt verlangen, weil du findest, dass es dir zusteht.

items.d: That uses very, very much money.
items.s: Flying people to Mars needs a lot of money; it is a ___ project.
items.hintDe: So teuer, dass es viele Milliarden kostet.

items.d: When one company owns it, not the government.
items.s: That spaceship is ___, so a company owns it and the government does not.
items.hintDe: Wenn es einer Person oder Firma gehört und nicht dem Staat.

items.d: To have a party for a big, happy day, like a birthday.
items.s: She wants to ___ her birthday with all her friends next weekend.
items.hintDe: An einem besonderen Tag eine Party machen.

items.d: Feeling very unhappy and sad for a long time, with no hope.
items.s: He was very ___ and unhappy, and he did not want to talk to anyone.
items.hintDe: Über lange Zeit sehr traurig und ohne Hoffnung.

items.d: To stop somebody who is busy, when they do not want anyone near them.
items.s: Please don't ___ your sister while she is doing her homework.
items.hintDe: Jemanden stören, der gerade beschäftigt ist.

items.d: A piece of art that somebody does so well it is their very best work.
items.s: This is the best work the artist has done — a true ___.
items.hintDe: Ein Kunstwerk, das jemandem ganz besonders gut gelungen ist.

items.d: Used to show that two people both do not do a thing.
items.s: ___ you nor I will fly into space for many years.
items.hintDe: Zeigt, dass das eine nicht stimmt und das andere auch nicht.

items.d: To write or talk back to somebody who writes to you.
items.s: It is good to ___ to a message and not just leave it.
items.hintDe: Jemandem zurückschreiben oder zurückantworten.

items.d: The closed place on a planet where plants and people can live and breathe.
items.s: A ___ is a closed place where plants and people can live and breathe, like on a planet.
items.hintDe: Ein geschlossener Ort, wo Pflanzen und Menschen leben und atmen können.

items.d: The science of changing the genes of a living thing to give it new qualities.
items.s: Scientists use ___ to make a clone of a living thing.
items.hintDe: Die Wissenschaft, die die Gene von Lebewesen verändert.

items.d: The power that pulls everything down and holds us on the ground.
items.s: It is ___ that pulls everything down to the ground and keeps us on the planet.
items.hintDe: Die Kraft, die alles nach unten zieht und uns am Boden hält.

items.d: A thing that a country has and can use, like oil, land or money.
items.s: Oil is a natural ___ that many countries use to make money.
items.hintDe: Etwas Nützliches, das ein Land hat und verwenden kann, wie Öl oder Land.

items.d: The outside of a thing, like the moon or the sea.
items.s: The astronauts walked on the dry, rocky ___ of the moon.
items.hintDe: Die äußere Seite von etwas, zum Beispiel vom Mond.

items.d: Not good for anyone to live in.
items.s: Mars is too cold and dry for people, so it is ___ today.
items.hintDe: So, dass niemand dort wohnen kann.

items.d: The one who is in charge of a ship, a plane or a spaceship.
items.s: The ___ of the spaceship is in charge of the whole crew.
items.hintDe: Die Person, die das Kommando über ein Schiff oder Raumschiff hat.

items.d: Making you feel very tired.
items.s: The long flight was very ___, and the whole crew was tired afterwards.
items.hintDe: So, dass es dich müde macht.
